title: Facetacts Awakening Gel Eye Patches, 30 Pairs, Vegan Collagen and Vitamin C, Instant Radiant Revival
features: QUANTITY: Contains 30 pairs of premium gel eye patches for multiple applications, providing excellent value for your skincare routine
KEY INGREDIENTS: Formulated with vegan collagen and vitamin C to help revitalise and rejuvenate the delicate eye area
INSTANT RESULTS: Delivers immediate radiant revival to tired-looking eyes, helping you achieve a more awakened appearance
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Comes in an elegant pink and white container with secure lid to maintain product freshness
GENTLE CARE: Specially designed gel patches provide a soothing and comfortable experience for the sensitive under-eye area
description: Product description Transform your under-eye area with Facefacts Awakening Gel Eye Patches. This luxurious set includes 30 pairs of revitalising gel patches infused with vegan collagen and vitamin C for an instant, radiant revival. Perfect for those mornings when you need an extra boost or as part of your self-care routine, these patches help refresh and rejuvenate the delicate eye area. The innovative gel formula works to provide an awakening effect while the patches comfortably adhere to your skin. Each pair delivers a concentrated dose of beneficial ingredients, making them ideal for regular use or special occasions when you want to look your best. The elegant pink packaging houses these premium patches in a convenient jar, ensuring they stay fresh and ready to use. Whether you're preparing for a special event or simply want to incorporate an effective eye care solution into your daily skincare regime, these patches offer a pampering experience with visible results. Safety Warning For external use only, do not use on broken or irritated skin.
